expected_query: Is this SBI rewards APK message genuine?
expected_response: The claim about an SBI reward redemption message asking users to download and install an APK file is FALSE. The official State Bank of India never sends links or APK files over SMS or WhatsApp. Never download unknown files or click on suspicious links. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2004888112846307655?s=20

expected_query: Will SBI YONO app be blocked if Aadhaar is not updated?
expected_response: The claim that SBI YONO accounts will be blocked if Aadhaar is not updated is FALSE. SBI does not ask users to download APK files or share personal or Aadhaar details through such messages. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1990453755280847072?s=20

expected_query: Will DoT block my mobile number through a call?
expected_response: The claim that the Department of Telecommunications calls people to threaten mobile number blocking is FALSE. DoT never makes such calls. This is a scam attempt. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999092176635166807?s=20

expected_query: Is the TRAI DND app genuine for blocking spam calls?
expected_response: The claim about the TRAI DND app allowing users to report and block promotional calls is TRUE. The app enables users to register under Do Not Disturb to avoid unsolicited commercial communication. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1923725073128542267?s=20

expected_query: Can Income Tax Department access social media from 2026?
expected_response: The claim that from April 1, 2026, the Income Tax Department can routinely access social media and emails is MISLEADING. Such powers apply only during formal search and survey operations related to significant tax evasion. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2003063216386228451?s=20

expected_query: Are ₹500 notes being discontinued by RBI?
expected_response: The claim that ₹500 currency notes will be discontinued is FALSE. RBI has made no such announcement. ₹500 notes remain legal tender. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1929898698290672131?s=20

expected_query: Is the India Post address update SMS genuine?
expected_response: The claim that India Post sends SMS links to update address details is FALSE. India Post never asks customers to update address details via SMS links. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1996110928593797284?s=20

expected_query: Is the HP Gas agency approval letter genuine?
expected_response: The approval letter claiming to provide HPCL gas distributorship is FALSE. The letter is fake. Visit official website for authentic information. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1964655682659217561?s=20

expected_query: Is India Post discontinuing Registered Post?
expected_response: The claim that India Post is discontinuing Registered Post is MISLEADING. It is being merged with Speed Post while key features remain unchanged. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1953727796603396435?s=20

expected_query: Did PM Modi violate protocol during Jordan visit?
expected_response: The claim that PM Narendra Modi violated protocol during his Jordan visit is FALSE. The viral video is AI-manipulated and fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2001899952088445089?s=20

expected_query: Is viksitbharatrozgaryojana.org an official government website?
expected_response: The claim that viksitbharatrozgaryojana.org is linked to the Ministry of Labour & Employment is FALSE. The website is fake and not associated with the Government of India. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1963171229596061964?s=20

expected_query: Is the viral MEA letter about Australia genuine?
expected_response: The letter attributed to Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri regarding cooperation with Australian authorities is FALSE. The Ministry of External Affairs has issued no such letter. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2000918804071940255?s=20

expected_query: Is the video of Nirmala Sitharaman promoting an investment platform real?
expected_response: The claim that the Finance Minister endorsed an investment scheme promising high returns is FALSE. The video is digitally altered and fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1965381174366445946?s=20

expected_query: Did India ask Russia to replace destroyed S-400 systems?
expected_response: The letter claiming India requested Russia to replace destroyed S-400 systems is FALSE. The letter is fake and part of propaganda. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1998026820604813666?s=20

expected_query: Is the DoT NOC for mobile tower installation genuine?
expected_response: The claim that the Department of Telecommunications issued an NOC for mobile tower installation with a fee is FALSE. Such letters are part of fraud. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1995092603323502923?s=20

expected_query: Will retired government employees stop getting DA hikes?
expected_response: The claim that retired government employees will lose DA hikes under Finance Act 2025 is FALSE. DA and Pay Commission benefits continue as per existing rules. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1988887470436716774?s=20

expected_query: Is India Post giving ₹20,000 Christmas gift through a quiz?
expected_response: The claim that India Post is offering ₹20,000 through a Christmas quiz is FALSE. No such scheme has been announced. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2003804622130196480?s=20

expected_query: Did former Army Chief Ved Prakash Malik praise Pakistan?
expected_response: The viral video showing Ved Prakash Malik praising Pakistan and admitting destruction of Rafale and S-400 systems is FALSE. The video is AI-generated and fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2000112419243507948?s=20

expected_query: Did CDS Anil Chauhan admit India lost 7 fighter jets?
expected_response: The claim that CDS General Anil Chauhan admitted India lost 7 fighter jets is FALSE. The viral video is an AI-generated deepfake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1948838884558995794?s=20

expected_query: Is China building up military near Arunachal Pradesh?
expected_response: The claim that China started a massive military build-up near Arunachal Pradesh is FALSE. The viral video is unrelated and shows a separate PLA exercise. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2000087543845720098?s=20

expected_query: Did the US warn PM Modi about a Pakistan attack?
expected_response: The claim that the US warned PM Modi about a Pakistan attack and India accepted conditions is MISLEADING. The statement of EAM S. Jaishankar was selectively quoted and misrepresented. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1940791899289215196?s=20

expected_query: Did the government admit COVID vaccines can cause paralysis?
expected_response: The claim that the Government admitted COVID-19 vaccines cause paralysis is FALSE and misleading. There is no scientific evidence of increased neurological disorders due to vaccines. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999392723691012412?s=20

expected_query: Did NCC DG Virendra Vats say Pakistani drones reached Delhi?
expected_response: The viral video claiming NCC DG Virendra Vats said Pakistani drones reached Delhi is FALSE. The video is digitally manipulated and AI-generated. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999378191446868289?s=20

expected_query: Is the letter signed by S. Jaishankar genuine?
expected_response: The letter attributed to Union Minister Dr. S. Jaishankar circulating online is FALSE. It is a fake document. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999092176635166807?s=20

expected_query: Will two-wheelers have to pay toll charges on highways?
expected_response: The claim that two-wheelers will be charged toll fees on highways is FALSE. NHAI has made no such announcement and bikes remain exempt. Source: https://x.com/NHAI_Official/status/1938155675445588222

expected_query: Is the I4C arrest warning letter genuine?
expected_response: The letter claiming to be from I4C threatening arrest is FALSE. It is a digital arrest scam and not issued by any Government agency. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999092176635166807?s=20

expected_query: Can factory owners force workers to work 12 hours under new labour laws?
expected_response: The claim that factory owners can force workers to work 12 hours and pay for only 8 hours is FALSE. Overtime must be paid and worker consent is mandatory. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1998732934778401056?s=20

expected_query: Did the Indian Army trigger landmine explosions in Balakot?
expected_response: The claim that the Indian Army triggered landmine explosions in Balakot is MISLEADING. The explosions were caused by a forest fire and falsely attributed as propaganda. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1998287358438064534?s=20

expected_query: Is the photo of aircraft on fire at Udhampur Air Base real?
expected_response: The claim that aircraft were on fire at Udhampur Air Base is FALSE. The image is misattributed and not from the Indian Air Force. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1922967703335338276?s=20

expected_query: Were India’s S-400 systems destroyed during tensions?
expected_response: The claim that India’s S-400 systems were destroyed is FALSE. The circulating letter is fake propaganda. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1998026820604813666?s=20

expected_query: Is EPFO stopping pensions if a new form is not submitted?
expected_response: The claim that EPFO will suspend pensions for not submitting a new form is FALSE. EPFO has issued no such notice and no pension suspension directive exists. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1938274883424665605?s=20

expected_query: Is the video of the Aviation Minister dancing related to recent flight cancellations?
expected_response: The claim is MISLEADING. The video of Union Civil Aviation Minister Kinjarapu Ram Mohan Naidu is four months old and unrelated to current IndiGo flight cancellations. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1997937595800846503?s=20

expected_query: Has the government opened a special bank account for army modernisation?
expected_response: The claim that a special bank account was opened for army modernisation is MISLEADING. The account relates to the Armed Forces Battle Casualty Welfare Fund, not defence procurement. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1925195668852752801?s=20

expected_query: Is the government giving ₹2,500 per month to unemployed youth?
expected_response: The claim that the Central Government is giving ₹2,500 per month as unemployment allowance is FALSE. No such scheme exists. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/2003407934093688960?s=20

expected_query: Did the government admit COVID vaccines cause paralysis?
expected_response: The claim that COVID-19 vaccines cause paralysis is FALSE and misleading. There is no scientific evidence showing increased neurological disorders due to vaccines. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1999392723691012412?s=20

expected_query: Is the central government distributing free bicycles?
expected_response: The claim that the Central Government is running a free bicycle distribution scheme is FALSE. No such scheme exists. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1997962583425655071?s=20

expected_query: Is Piyush Goyal promoting the QuantumAI investment platform?
expected_response: The claim that Union Minister Piyush Goyal endorsed QuantumAI is FALSE. The video is digitally altered and the government supports no such scheme. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1997238492729131346?s=20

expected_query: Did the Navy Chief say Pakistan tracked Indian fighter jets?
expected_response: The claim that Navy Chief Admiral Dinesh K. Tripathi admitted Pakistan tracked Indian jets is FALSE. The clip is AI-generated and fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1996262495573664101?s=20

expected_query: Did BSF IG Ashok Yadav admit failure in Kashmir operations?
expected_response: The claim that BSF IG Ashok Yadav admitted failure is FALSE. The viral video is digitally manipulated and AI-generated. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1995547591770341577?s=20

expected_query: Has Israel cancelled defence exercises with India?
expected_response: The claim that Israel cancelled defence exercises with India is FALSE. The viral video of IAI CEO Boaz Levy is AI-generated and fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1996142171045634337?s=20

expected_query: Did BSF IG Ashok Yadav admit failure in counter-terrorism operations?
expected_response: The claim that BSF IG Ashok Yadav admitted failure in counter-terrorism operations is FALSE. The viral video is digitally manipulated and AI-generated. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1995547591770341577?s=20

expected_query: Did India ask Pakistan to send Imran Khan as a political prisoner?
expected_response: The claim that India asked Pakistan to send Imran Khan as a political prisoner is FALSE. The letter circulating online is fake and part of a disinformation campaign. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1995470903246016879?s=20

expected_query: Did Air Chief Marshal A. P. Singh praise Pakistan in a letter?
expected_response: The letter claiming Air Chief Marshal A. P. Singh praised Pakistan is FALSE. The document has been digitally morphed and is fake. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1995366823832047729?s=20

expected_query: Did CDS Anil Chauhan say India surrendered territory to China?
expected_response: The claim that CDS General Anil Chauhan said India surrendered territory to China is FALSE. The viral video is digitally altered and AI-generated. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1994728432157299204?s=20

expected_query: Did the IAF Chief resign after losing Rafale and Tejas aircraft?
expected_response: The claim that the Indian Air Force Chief resigned after losing Rafale and Tejas aircraft is FALSE. The circulating letter is fake and part of a disinformation campaign. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1994423295987613854?s=20

expected_query: Is RBI withdrawing ₹500 notes with the green strip near Gandhi?
expected_response: The claim that RBI is withdrawing ₹500 notes with a green strip near Gandhi’s image is FALSE. Such notes remain valid legal tender and no advisory has been issued. Source: https://x.com/PIB_India/status/1207233648157585409?s=20

expected_query: Are lawyers exempted from paying toll fees in India?
expected_response: The claim that lawyers are exempted from paying toll fees on national highways is FALSE. NHAI has issued no such exemption. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1207651097466195970?s=20

expected_query: Is the women safety SMS police service genuine?
expected_response: The claim that women can SMS vehicle numbers to police at 9969777888 for tracking is FALSE. The service was Mumbai-specific and discontinued in 2017. Source: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1207653814930530304?s=20
